function resetMidiState() {
  activeNotes.clear();
  fingerDownNotes.clear();
  pedalSustainedNotes.clear();
  noteHistory.length = 0;
  recentMidiNotes.length = 0;
  onsets.length = 0;
  pedalDown = false;
  updatePedalStatus();
}

function updateMidiStatus(text) {
  document.getElementById('midiStatus').textContent = text;
}

function updatePedalStatus() {
  var el = document.getElementById('pedalStatus');
  el.textContent = pedalDown ? 'Pedal Down' : 'Pedal Up';
  el.className = pedalDown ? 'pedal-pill active' : 'pedal-pill';
}

async function refreshMidiInputs() {
  var select = document.getElementById('midiInputSelect');
  if (!navigator.requestMIDIAccess) {
    updateMidiStatus('Web MIDI not supported');
    select.innerHTML = '<option value="">Web MIDI unavailable</option>';
    return;
  }

  try {
    updateMidiStatus('Checking MIDI devices...');
    if (!midiAccess) {
      midiAccess = await navigator.requestMIDIAccess();
      midiAccess.onstatechange = function() { refreshMidiInputs(); };
    }

    var inputs = Array.from(midiAccess.inputs.values());
    select.innerHTML = '';
    if (!inputs.length) {
      select.innerHTML = '<option value="">No MIDI input found</option>';
      if (midiInput) midiInput.onmidimessage = null;
      midiInput = null;
      updateMidiStatus('No MIDI input found');
      return;
    }

    inputs.forEach(function(input) {
      var option = document.createElement('option');
      option.value = input.id;
      option.textContent = input.name || 'MIDI Input';
      select.appendChild(option);
    });

    if (!midiInput || !midiAccess.inputs.has(midiInput.id)) {
      setMidiInput(inputs[0].id);
    } else {
      select.value = midiInput.id;
      updateMidiStatus('MIDI: ' + (midiInput.name || 'Connected'));
    }
  } catch (err) {
    var name = err && err.name ? err.name : 'Error';
    if (name === 'NotAllowedError' || name === 'SecurityError') {
      updateMidiStatus('MIDI permission blocked');
    } else {
      updateMidiStatus('MIDI error: ' + name);
    }
    console.error('Failed to refresh MIDI inputs', err);
  }
}

function setMidiInput(inputId) {
  if (!midiAccess) return;
  if (midiInput) midiInput.onmidimessage = null;
  midiInput = inputId ? midiAccess.inputs.get(inputId) : null;
  if (midiInput) {
    midiInput.onmidimessage = handleMidiMessage;
    document.getElementById('midiInputSelect').value = midiInput.id;
    updateMidiStatus('MIDI: ' + (midiInput.name || 'Connected'));
  } else {
    updateMidiStatus('MIDI not connected');
  }
}

function handleMidiMessage(event) {
  var data = event.data;
  if (!data || data.length < 2) return;

  var status = data[0];
  var command = status & 0xf0;
  var channel = status & 0x0f;
  var data1 = data[1];
  var data2 = data.length > 2 ? data[2] : 0;
  var nowMs = Date.now();

  if (command === 0x90 && data2 > 0) {
    handleNoteOn(data1, data2, nowMs);
    sendMidiEvent({ event: 'noteOn', note: data1, velocity: data2, channel: channel, timestampMs: nowMs });
  } else if (command === 0x80 || (command === 0x90 && data2 === 0)) {
    handleNoteOff(data1, nowMs);
    sendMidiEvent({ event: 'noteOff', note: data1, velocity: data2, channel: channel, timestampMs: nowMs });
  } else if (command === 0xb0) {
    handleControlChange(data1, data2, nowMs);
    sendMidiEvent({ event: 'controlChange', controller: data1, value: data2, channel: channel, timestampMs: nowMs });
  }
}

function handleNoteOn(note, velocity, nowMs) {
  // Close any open history entries for this note (e.g. pedal-sustained re-trigger)
  for (var hi = noteHistory.length - 1; hi >= 0; hi--) {
    if (noteHistory[hi].note === note && noteHistory[hi].endMs === 0) {
      noteHistory[hi].endMs = nowMs;
      if (!noteHistory[hi].fingerDurationMs) noteHistory[hi].fingerDurationMs = nowMs - noteHistory[hi].startMs;
      break;
    }
  }
  activeNotes.set(note, { note: note, velocity: velocity, timestamp: nowMs });
  fingerDownNotes.add(note);
  pedalSustainedNotes.delete(note);
  noteHistory.push({ note: note, velocity: velocity, startMs: nowMs, endMs: 0, fingerDurationMs: 0 });
  if (noteHistory.length > 500) noteHistory.splice(0, noteHistory.length - 500);
  recentMidiNotes.push({ note: note, velocity: velocity, timestampMs: nowMs });
  if (recentMidiNotes.length > 64) recentMidiNotes.splice(0, recentMidiNotes.length - 64);
  vfxSpawnParticles(note, velocity);
  onsets.push(nowMs);
  while (onsets.length && nowMs - onsets[0] > 30000) onsets.shift();
  scheduleMidiSnapshot();
}

function handleNoteOff(note, nowMs) {
  fingerDownNotes.delete(note);

  for (var i = noteHistory.length - 1; i >= 0; i--) {
    var entry = noteHistory[i];
    if (entry.note === note && entry.endMs === 0) {
      entry.fingerDurationMs = Math.max(0, nowMs - entry.startMs);
      if (pedalDown) {
        pedalSustainedNotes.add(note);
      } else {
        entry.endMs = nowMs;
        activeNotes.delete(note);
      }
      break;
    }
  }

  if (!pedalDown) {
    pedalSustainedNotes.delete(note);
    activeNotes.delete(note);
  }

  scheduleMidiSnapshot();
}

function handleControlChange(controller, value, nowMs) {
  if (controller !== 64) return;
  var wasDown = pedalDown;
  pedalDown = value >= 64;
  updatePedalStatus();

  if (wasDown && !pedalDown) {
    pedalSustainedNotes.forEach(function(note) {
      activeNotes.delete(note);
      for (var i = noteHistory.length - 1; i >= 0; i--) {
        var entry = noteHistory[i];
        if (entry.note === note && entry.endMs === 0) {
          entry.endMs = nowMs;
          break;
        }
      }
    });
    pedalSustainedNotes.clear();
  }

  scheduleMidiSnapshot();
}

function sendMidiEvent(payload) {
  if (!ws || ws.readyState !== WebSocket.OPEN) return;
  ws.send(JSON.stringify({
    type: 'midi_event',
    event: payload.event,
    note: payload.note,
    velocity: payload.velocity,
    controller: payload.controller,
    value: payload.value,
    channel: payload.channel,
    timestampMs: payload.timestampMs
  }));
}

function scheduleMidiSnapshot() {
  if (midiSnapshotTimer) clearTimeout(midiSnapshotTimer);
  midiSnapshotTimer = setTimeout(function() {
    sendMidiSnapshot(false);
  }, 250);
}

function sendMidiSnapshot(force) {
  if (!ws || ws.readyState !== WebSocket.OPEN) return;
  var nowMs = Date.now();

  var activePayload = Array.from(activeNotes.values()).map(function(note) {
    return { note: note.note, velocity: note.velocity };
  });
  var recentPayload = recentMidiNotes
    .filter(function(note) { return nowMs - note.timestampMs < 2500; })
    .slice(-8)
    .map(function(note) { return { note: note.note, velocity: note.velocity }; });

  var hasPerformanceSignal = activePayload.length > 0 || recentPayload.length > 0 || pedalDown;
  if (!hasPerformanceSignal) return;
  if (!force && nowMs - lastMidiSnapshotAt < 1200) return;
  lastMidiSnapshotAt = nowMs;

  ws.send(JSON.stringify({
    type: 'midi_snapshot',
    active_notes: activePayload,
    recent_notes: recentPayload,
    detected_techniques: detectTechniques(),
    pedal_down: pedalDown,
    bpm: parseInt(bpmSlider.value, 10) || 90,
    score: currentScore
  }));
}

// ============================================================================
// Session management
// ============================================================================
function toggleSession() {
  if (sessionActive) { stopSession(); return; }
  startSession();
}
async function startSession() {
  sessionActive = true;
  var btn = document.getElementById('btnStart');
  btn.textContent = 'Stop Session';
  btn.className = 'danger';
  setStatus('connecting');

  try {
    mediaStream = await navigator.mediaDevices.getUserMedia({
      audio: {
        echoCancellation: true,
        noiseSuppression: true,
        autoGainControl: true,
        channelCount: 1
      },
      video: false
    });

    audioCtx = new AudioContext();
    var nativeRate = audioCtx.sampleRate;
    var source = audioCtx.createMediaStreamSource(mediaStream);
    analyser = audioCtx.createAnalyser();
    analyser.fftSize = 2048;
    analyser.smoothingTimeConstant = 0.8;
    source.connect(analyser);
    processor = audioCtx.createScriptProcessor(4096, 1, 1);
    source.connect(processor);
    processor.connect(audioCtx.destination);

    playbackCtx = new AudioContext({ sampleRate: 24000 });
    nextPlayTime = 0;
    var downsampleRatio = nativeRate / 16000;
    processor.onaudioprocess = function(e) {
      if (!ws || ws.readyState !== WebSocket.OPEN) return;
      if (isBotSpeaking) return;
      if (playbackCtx && playbackCtx.currentTime < playbackActiveUntil) return;
      var f32 = e.inputBuffer.getChannelData(0);
      // Energy gate: skip silent chunks so Gemini detects end-of-speech
      var sum = 0;
      for (var j = 0; j < f32.length; j++) sum += f32[j] * f32[j];
      var rms = Math.sqrt(sum / f32.length);
      if (rms < 0.01) return;
      var outLen = Math.floor(f32.length / downsampleRatio);
      var pcm16 = new Int16Array(outLen);
      for (var i = 0; i < outLen; i++) {
        var srcIdx = Math.floor(i * downsampleRatio);
        pcm16[i] = Math.max(-32768, Math.min(32767, Math.round(f32[srcIdx] * 32767)));
      }
      ws.send(pcm16.buffer);
    };

    function connectWebSocket(isReconnect) {
      var proto = location.protocol === 'https:' ? 'wss' : 'ws';
      ws = new WebSocket(proto + '://' + location.host + '/ws/session');
      ws.binaryType = 'arraybuffer';

      ws.onopen = function() {
        setStatus('connected');
        reconnectDelay = 1000;
        sessionActive = true;
        if (!isReconnect) {
          sessionStartTime = Date.now();
          resetMidiState();
          currentScore = 0;
        }
        ws.send(JSON.stringify({ type: 'set_mode', mode: 'storyteller' }));
        refreshMidiInputs();

        if (!animFrame) {
          drawLoop();
        }
      };

      ws.onmessage = function(event) {
        if (event.data instanceof ArrayBuffer) {
          queueAudio(event.data);
        } else {
          var msg = JSON.parse(event.data);
          if (msg.type === 'story_scene' || msg.type === 'achievement' ||
                     msg.type === 'coaching_focus' || msg.type === 'quest_advance' ||
                     msg.type === 'technique_report') {
            handleToolEvent(msg);
          } else if (msg.type === 'video_frame') {
            var camImg = document.getElementById('remoteCameraImg');
            var camWrap = document.getElementById('remoteCameraWrap');
            if (camImg && msg.data) {
              camImg.src = 'data:image/jpeg;base64,' + msg.data;
              if (camWrap) camWrap.style.display = '';
            }
          } else if (msg.type === 'camera_state') {
            cameraEnabled = Boolean(msg.enabled);
            updateCameraUi();
          } else if (msg.type === 'hand_state') {
            bothHandsDetected = Boolean(msg.bothHands);
            updateCameraUi();
          } else if (msg.type === 'you_are_primary') {
            isPrimaryDevice = true;
            myDeviceId = msg.deviceId;
            myRoomCode = msg.room;
            document.getElementById('deviceManagerPanel').style.display = '';
            document.getElementById('roomCodeDisplay').textContent = msg.room;
            updateQr(msg.room);
            startSpeechRecognition();
          } else if (msg.type === 'room_code') {
            myRoomCode = msg.room;
            var label = document.getElementById('statusLabel');
            if (label) label.textContent = 'Connected · Room: ' + msg.room;
          } else if (msg.type === 'device_list') {
            deviceList = msg.devices || [];
            renderDeviceList();
          } else if (msg.type === 'role_assigned') {
            myRoles = msg.roles;
          } else if (msg.type === 'input_transcript') {
            if (msg.text) addMessage(msg.text, 'input');
          } else if (msg.type === 'output_transcript') {
            if (msg.text) addMessage(msg.text, 'output');
          } else if (msg.type === 'midi') {
            // Remote MIDI from Ubuntu bridge — feed into existing visualization
            var nowMs = msg.timestampMs || Date.now();
            if (msg.event === 'noteOn' && msg.velocity > 0) {
              handleNoteOn(msg.note, msg.velocity, nowMs);
            } else if (msg.event === 'noteOff' || (msg.event === 'noteOn' && msg.velocity === 0)) {
              handleNoteOff(msg.note, nowMs);
            } else if (msg.event === 'controlChange') {
              handleControlChange(msg.controller || msg.note, msg.value || msg.velocity, nowMs);
            }
            updateMidiStatus('MIDI (remote bridge)');
          }
        }
      };

      ws.onclose = function() {
        setStatus('disconnected');
        if (sessionActive) {
          setTimeout(function() {
            if (!sessionActive) return;
            reconnectDelay = Math.min(reconnectDelay * 2, 30000);
            connectWebSocket(true);
          }, reconnectDelay);
        }
      };

      ws.onerror = function() { setStatus('error'); };
    }

    connectWebSocket(false);

  } catch (err) {
    console.error('Failed to start session:', err);
    setStatus('error');
    resetStartButton();
  }
}

function resetStartButton() {
  sessionActive = false;
  var btn = document.getElementById('btnStart');
  btn.textContent = 'Start Session';
  btn.className = 'primary';
}

// ============================================================================
// Web Speech API — browser-side speech-to-text for user transcript
// ============================================================================
var speechRecognition = null;

function startSpeechRecognition() {
  var SpeechRec = window.SpeechRecognition || window.webkitSpeechRecognition;
  if (!SpeechRec) { console.log('SpeechRecognition not supported'); return; }
  speechRecognition = new SpeechRec();
  speechRecognition.lang = 'en-US';
  speechRecognition.continuous = true;
  speechRecognition.interimResults = false;
  speechRecognition.onresult = function(e) {
    if (isBotSpeaking) return; // Don't transcribe Gemini's own voice
    for (var i = e.resultIndex; i < e.results.length; i++) {
      if (e.results[i].isFinal) {
        var text = e.results[i][0].transcript.trim();
        if (text && ws && ws.readyState === WebSocket.OPEN) {
          ws.send(JSON.stringify({ type: 'user_speech_transcript', text: text }));
        }
      }
    }
  };
  speechRecognition.onend = function() {
    // Auto-restart — Chrome and Safari can stop unexpectedly
    if (sessionActive && speechRecognition) {
      try { speechRecognition.start(); } catch(e) {}
    }
  };
  speechRecognition.onerror = function(e) {
    console.log('SpeechRecognition error:', e.error);
  };
  try { speechRecognition.start(); } catch(e) {}
}

function stopSpeechRecognition() {
  if (speechRecognition) {
    var sr = speechRecognition;
    speechRecognition = null;
    try { sr.stop(); } catch(e) {}
  }
}

function stopSession() {
  sessionActive = false;
  stopSpeechRecognition();
  if (ws && ws.readyState === WebSocket.OPEN) {
    ws.send(JSON.stringify({ type: 'close' }));
    ws.close();
  }
  ws = null;
  if (midiSnapshotTimer) { clearTimeout(midiSnapshotTimer); midiSnapshotTimer = null; }
  if (animFrame) { cancelAnimationFrame(animFrame); animFrame = null; }
  if (processor) { processor.disconnect(); processor = null; }
  if (analyser) { analyser.disconnect(); analyser = null; }
  if (audioCtx) { audioCtx.close(); audioCtx = null; }
  if (playbackCtx) { playbackCtx.close(); playbackCtx = null; }
  if (mediaStream) { mediaStream.getTracks().forEach(function(t) { t.stop(); }); mediaStream = null; }
  resetStartButton();
  resetMidiState();
  setStatus('disconnected');
}

// ============================================================================
// Audio playback
// ============================================================================
function queueAudio(arrayBuf) {
  if (!playbackCtx) return;
  var int16 = new Int16Array(arrayBuf);
  var float32 = new Float32Array(int16.length);
  var rms = 0;
  for (var i = 0; i < int16.length; i++) {
    float32[i] = int16[i] / 32768;
    rms += float32[i] * float32[i];
  }
  rms = Math.sqrt(rms / int16.length);
  // Update speaking indicator
  var speakEl = document.getElementById('geminiSpeaking');
  var labelEl = document.getElementById('geminiSpeakLabel');
  var fillEl = document.getElementById('geminiVolFill');
  if (fillEl) {
    if (labelEl) labelEl.textContent = 'Speaking';
    fillEl.style.width = Math.min(100, rms * 500) + '%';
  }
  isBotSpeaking = true;
  var buffer = playbackCtx.createBuffer(1, float32.length, 24000);
  buffer.copyToChannel(float32, 0);
  var src = playbackCtx.createBufferSource();
  src.buffer = buffer;
  src.connect(playbackCtx.destination);
  var now = playbackCtx.currentTime;
  var startTime = Math.max(now + 0.01, nextPlayTime);
  src.start(startTime);
  nextPlayTime = startTime + buffer.duration;
  playbackActiveUntil = nextPlayTime + 0.2;
  // Reset indicator when playback ends
  src.onended = function() {
    if (playbackCtx && playbackCtx.currentTime >= playbackActiveUntil - 0.25) {
      isBotSpeaking = false;
      if (labelEl) labelEl.textContent = 'Silent';
      if (fillEl) fillEl.style.width = '0%';
    }
  };
}

// ============================================================================
// Visualization loop
// ============================================================================
function sizeMidiStack() {
  var stack = document.getElementById('midiStack');
  if (!stack) return;
  var totalH = stack.clientHeight;
  if (totalH < 100) return;
  // Proportions: waterfall 4, keyboard 3.5, grand staff 4 = 11.5 total
  var rollH = Math.round(totalH * 4 / 11.5);
  var kbH = Math.round(totalH * 3.5 / 11.5);
  var staffH = totalH - rollH - kbH;
  document.getElementById('rollWrap').style.height = rollH + 'px';
  document.getElementById('keyboardWrap').style.height = kbH + 'px';
  document.getElementById('staffWrap').style.height = staffH + 'px';
}

function drawLoop() {
  if (!sessionActive) return;
  sizeMidiStack();
  drawPianoRoll();
  drawGrandStaff();
  drawKeyboard();
  updateLevelMeter();
  animFrame = requestAnimationFrame(drawLoop);
}

function drawPianoRoll() {
  vfxUpdate();
  var canvas = document.getElementById('pianoRollCanvas');
  var ctx = canvas.getContext('2d');
  var dpr = window.devicePixelRatio || 1;
  var rect = canvas.getBoundingClientRect();
  if (!rect.width) return;
  canvas.width = rect.width * dpr;
  canvas.height = rect.height * dpr;
  ctx.setTransform(dpr, 0, 0, dpr, 0, 0);
  var W = rect.width;
  var H = rect.height;
  if (H < 50) return;
  var waterfallH = H;  // full height — dynamics moved to keyboard canvas
  var whiteKeyW = W / WHITE_KEYS_COUNT;
  var blackKeyW = whiteKeyW * 0.65;
  var pixelsPerMs = waterfallH / 5000;
  var nowMs = Date.now();
  var bpm = parseInt(bpmSlider.value, 10) || 90;
  var msPerBeat = 60000 / bpm;

  ctx.clearRect(0, 0, W, H);
  ctx.fillStyle = '#0a0a0a';
  ctx.fillRect(0, 0, W, waterfallH);

  ctx.strokeStyle = 'rgba(255,255,255,0.04)';
  ctx.lineWidth = 0.5;
  for (var i = 0; i <= WHITE_KEYS_COUNT; i++) {
    var laneX = i * whiteKeyW;
    ctx.beginPath();
    ctx.moveTo(laneX, 0);
    ctx.lineTo(laneX, waterfallH);
    ctx.stroke();
  }

  ctx.strokeStyle = 'rgba(255,255,255,0.06)';
  ctx.lineWidth = 1;
  KEYBOARD.forEach(function(key) {
    if (!key.isBlack && key.midi % 12 === 0) {
      var x = key.whiteIndex * whiteKeyW;
      ctx.beginPath();
      ctx.moveTo(x, 0);
      ctx.lineTo(x, waterfallH);
      ctx.stroke();
    }
  });

  KEYBOARD.forEach(function(key) {
    if (!key.isBlack) return;
    var x = (key.whiteIndex + 1) * whiteKeyW - blackKeyW / 2;
    ctx.fillStyle = '#0d0d0d';
    ctx.fillRect(x, 0, blackKeyW, waterfallH);
  });

  var firstBeatOffset = nowMs % msPerBeat;
  var totalBeats = Math.ceil(5000 / msPerBeat) + 1;
  for (var beat = 0; beat < totalBeats; beat++) {
    var beatTimeAgo = firstBeatOffset + beat * msPerBeat;
    var y = waterfallH - beatTimeAgo * pixelsPerMs;
    if (y < 0 || y > waterfallH) continue;
    var beatIndex = Math.round((nowMs - beatTimeAgo) / msPerBeat);
    ctx.strokeStyle = beatIndex % 4 === 0 ? 'rgba(255,255,255,0.12)' : 'rgba(255,255,255,0.05)';
    ctx.lineWidth = beatIndex % 4 === 0 ? 1 : 0.5;
    ctx.beginPath();
    ctx.moveTo(0, y);
    ctx.lineTo(W, y);
    ctx.stroke();
  }

  function drawHistory(blackOnly) {
    noteHistory.forEach(function(entry) {
      var keyInfo = KEY_BY_MIDI.get(entry.note);
      if (!keyInfo || keyInfo.isBlack !== blackOnly) return;

      var totalAge = nowMs - entry.startMs;
      if (totalAge > 5000) return;

      var noteX = keyInfo.isBlack
        ? (keyInfo.whiteIndex + 1) * whiteKeyW - blackKeyW / 2
        : keyInfo.whiteIndex * whiteKeyW + 1;
      var noteW = keyInfo.isBlack ? blackKeyW : whiteKeyW - 2;
      var bodyW = noteW * (2 / 3);
      var bodyX = noteX + (noteW - bodyW) / 2;
      var headColor = dynamicsColor(entry.velocity);
      var pedalColor = darkenedColor(entry.velocity, 0.5);

      var fingerEndMs = (entry.fingerDurationMs > 0) ? entry.startMs + entry.fingerDurationMs : null;
      var finalEndMs = entry.endMs || nowMs;

      function drawSegment(segStartMs, segEndMs, color, isHead) {
        var ageStart = nowMs - segStartMs;
        var ageEnd = nowMs - segEndMs;
        var yBottom = segEndMs === nowMs ? waterfallH : waterfallH - ageEnd * pixelsPerMs;
        var yTop = waterfallH - ageStart * pixelsPerMs;
        if (yBottom < 0 || yTop > waterfallH) return;

        var clampedTop = Math.max(0, yTop);
        var clampedBottom = Math.min(waterfallH, yBottom);
        var noteH = clampedBottom - clampedTop;
        if (noteH < 1) return;

        var c = dynamicsRgb(entry.velocity);

        if (isHead) {
          // Finger-held: inner gradient fill (bright edge → slightly darker center)
          var innerGrad = ctx.createLinearGradient(bodyX, 0, bodyX + bodyW, 0);
          innerGrad.addColorStop(0, 'rgba(' + c.r + ',' + c.g + ',' + c.b + ',0.9)');
          innerGrad.addColorStop(0.3, 'rgba(' + Math.round(c.r * 0.7) + ',' + Math.round(c.g * 0.7) + ',' + Math.round(c.b * 0.7) + ',0.7)');
          innerGrad.addColorStop(0.7, 'rgba(' + Math.round(c.r * 0.7) + ',' + Math.round(c.g * 0.7) + ',' + Math.round(c.b * 0.7) + ',0.7)');
          innerGrad.addColorStop(1, 'rgba(' + c.r + ',' + c.g + ',' + c.b + ',0.9)');
          ctx.fillStyle = innerGrad;
          ctx.fillRect(bodyX, clampedTop, bodyW, noteH);
          // Bright edge highlight
          ctx.fillStyle = 'rgba(' + c.r + ',' + c.g + ',' + c.b + ',0.6)';
          ctx.fillRect(bodyX, clampedTop, 1, noteH);
          ctx.fillRect(bodyX + bodyW - 1, clampedTop, 1, noteH);
        } else {
          // Pedal-sustained: filled bar with glowing rim
          var pulse = 0.8 + 0.2 * Math.sin(nowMs / 400 + entry.note * 0.5);
          // Interior fill — visible but dimmer than finger-held
          ctx.fillStyle = 'rgba(' + Math.round(c.r * 0.4) + ',' + Math.round(c.g * 0.4) + ',' + Math.round(c.b * 0.4) + ',0.4)';
          ctx.fillRect(bodyX, clampedTop, bodyW, noteH);
          // Thick glowing rim
          ctx.strokeStyle = color;
          ctx.globalAlpha = 0.7 * pulse;
          ctx.lineWidth = 2.5;
          ctx.shadowColor = color;
          ctx.shadowBlur = 8 * pulse;
          ctx.strokeRect(bodyX, clampedTop, bodyW, noteH);
          ctx.shadowBlur = 0;
          ctx.globalAlpha = 1.0;
        }

        // VFX: Gradient tail below note bar (comet trail)
        if (isHead && clampedBottom < waterfallH) {
          var tailH = 12;
          var tailGrad = ctx.createLinearGradient(0, clampedBottom, 0, clampedBottom + tailH);
          tailGrad.addColorStop(0, 'rgba(' + c.r + ',' + c.g + ',' + c.b + ',0.35)');
          tailGrad.addColorStop(1, 'rgba(' + c.r + ',' + c.g + ',' + c.b + ',0)');
          ctx.fillStyle = tailGrad;
          ctx.fillRect(bodyX, clampedBottom, bodyW, tailH);
        }
      }

      if (fingerEndMs && fingerEndMs < finalEndMs) {
        drawSegment(entry.startMs, fingerEndMs, headColor, true);
        drawSegment(fingerEndMs, finalEndMs, pedalColor, false);
      } else {
        drawSegment(entry.startMs, finalEndMs, headColor, true);
      }

      var headY = waterfallH - totalAge * pixelsPerMs;
      if (headY >= 0 && headY <= waterfallH) {
        ctx.fillStyle = headColor;
        ctx.fillRect(noteX, Math.max(0, headY), noteW, 2);
        ctx.fillStyle = dynamicsColor(entry.velocity, Math.min(0.35, (entry.velocity / 127) * 0.35));
        ctx.fillRect(noteX, Math.max(0, headY), noteW, 1);
      }
    });
  }

  drawHistory(false);
  drawHistory(true);

  // Target notes flowing down from top
  var targetTempo = parseInt(document.getElementById('bpmSlider').value, 10) || 90;
  var targetMsPerBeat = 60000 / targetTempo;
  for (var ti = 0; ti < targetNotes.length; ti++) {
    var tn = targetNotes[ti];
    var timeUntilArrive = tn.arriveMs - nowMs;
    if (timeUntilArrive < -500) continue;
    if (timeUntilArrive > 5000) continue;

    var keyInfo = KEY_BY_MIDI.get(tn.midi);
    if (!keyInfo) continue;

    var tnX = keyInfo.isBlack
      ? (keyInfo.whiteIndex + 1) * whiteKeyW - blackKeyW / 2
      : keyInfo.whiteIndex * whiteKeyW + 1;
    var tnW = keyInfo.isBlack ? blackKeyW : whiteKeyW - 2;
    // Target falls from top (y=0) to bottom (y=waterfallH) as arriveMs approaches
    var tnH = Math.max(4, tn.durationBeats * targetMsPerBeat * pixelsPerMs);
    var tnY = waterfallH - timeUntilArrive * pixelsPerMs - tnH;

    if (tnY + tnH < 0 || tnY > waterfallH) continue;

    var tnAlpha = tn.hit ? 0.15 : 0.4;
    ctx.strokeStyle = tn.hit ? 'rgba(0,200,100,' + tnAlpha + ')' : 'rgba(100,150,255,' + tnAlpha + ')';
    ctx.lineWidth = 1.5;
    ctx.strokeRect(tnX + 1, Math.max(0, tnY), tnW - 2, tnH);

    // Fill with faint color
    ctx.fillStyle = tn.hit ? 'rgba(0,200,100,0.05)' : 'rgba(100,150,255,0.08)';
    ctx.fillRect(tnX + 1, Math.max(0, tnY), tnW - 2, tnH);
  }

  // VFX: Note-hit flashes at keyboard edge
  vfxDrawFlashes(ctx, waterfallH);

  // VFX: Particles above keyboard
  vfxDrawParticles(ctx);

  ctx.strokeStyle = 'rgba(255,255,255,0.6)';
  ctx.lineWidth = 1.5;
  ctx.beginPath();
  ctx.moveTo(0, waterfallH - 1);
  ctx.lineTo(W, waterfallH - 1);
  ctx.stroke();

  var fadeH = waterfallH * 0.1;
  var fadeGrad = ctx.createLinearGradient(0, 0, 0, fadeH);
  fadeGrad.addColorStop(0, '#0a0a0a');
  fadeGrad.addColorStop(1, 'rgba(10,10,10,0)');
  ctx.fillStyle = fadeGrad;
  ctx.fillRect(0, 0, W, fadeH);

}

// ============================================================================
// Grand Staff — diatonic coordinate system (from PianoQuest app)
// ============================================================================

// Staff line MIDI values
var TREBLE_LINE_MIDIS = [64, 67, 71, 74, 77]; // E4, G4, B4, D5, F5
var BASS_LINE_MIDIS   = [43, 47, 50, 53, 57]; // G2, B2, D3, F3, A3

// Key signature data: number of accidentals (positive = sharps, negative = flats)
var KEY_SIG_MAP = {
  'C major': 0, 'A minor': 0,
  'G major': 1, 'E minor': 1,
  'D major': 2, 'B minor': 2,
  'A major': 3, 'F# minor': 3,
  'E major': 4, 'C# minor': 4,
  'B major': 5, 'G# minor': 5,
  'F# major': 6, 'D# minor': 6,
  'F major': -1, 'D minor': -1,
  'Bb major': -2, 'G minor': -2,
  'Eb major': -3, 'C minor': -3,
  'Ab major': -4, 'F minor': -4,
  'Db major': -5, 'Bb minor': -5,
  'Gb major': -6, 'Eb minor': -6
};

// Sharp positions on staff (MIDI values for treble and bass)
var TREBLE_SHARP_POS = [77, 72, 79, 74, 69, 76, 71]; // F5, C5, G5(above), D5, A4, E5, B4
var BASS_SHARP_POS   = [53, 48, 55, 50, 45, 52, 47]; // F3, C3, G3, D3, A2, E3, B2
var TREBLE_FLAT_POS  = [71, 76, 69, 74, 67, 72, 65]; // B4, E5, A4, D5, G4, C5, F4
var BASS_FLAT_POS    = [47, 52, 45, 50, 43, 48, 41]; // B2, E3, A2, D3, G2, C3, F2

// Semitones affected by key signature
function getKeySigSemitones(keyName) {
  var n = KEY_SIG_MAP[keyName] || 0;
  var sharpOrder = [6, 1, 8, 3, 10, 5, 0]; // F#, C#, G#, D#, A#, E#, B#
  var flatOrder  = [10, 3, 8, 1, 6, 11, 4]; // Bb, Eb, Ab, Db, Gb, Cb, Fb
  var set = new Set();
  if (n > 0) { for (var i = 0; i < n; i++) set.add(sharpOrder[i]); }
  else if (n < 0) { for (var i = 0; i < -n; i++) set.add(flatOrder[i]); }
  return set;
}

function isUseFlats(keyName) {
  return (KEY_SIG_MAP[keyName] || 0) < 0;
}

// Get the 7 diatonic semitones (0-11) for a given key
function getScaleSemitones(keyName) {
  // Major scale intervals: W W H W W W H
  var majorIntervals = [0, 2, 4, 5, 7, 9, 11];
  // Minor scale intervals: W H W W H W W
  var minorIntervals = [0, 2, 3, 5, 7, 8, 10];
  var rootMap = { 'C': 0, 'D': 2, 'E': 4, 'F': 5, 'G': 7, 'A': 9, 'B': 11,
                  'Db': 1, 'D#': 3, 'Eb': 3, 'F#': 6, 'Gb': 6, 'G#': 8, 'Ab': 8, 'Bb': 10, 'C#': 1 };
  var parts = keyName.split(' ');
  var root = rootMap[parts[0]] || 0;
  var intervals = (parts[1] === 'minor') ? minorIntervals : majorIntervals;
  var set = new Set();
  for (var i = 0; i < intervals.length; i++) {
    set.add((root + intervals[i]) % 12);
  }
  return set;
}

// Target notes for practice — flowing from right on grand staff, from top on waterfall
var targetNotes = [];
var targetNoteTimer = null;
var staffStartTime = 0;

function startTargetNotes() {
  staffStartTime = Date.now();
  targetNotes = [];
}

function addTargetNote(midi, beatIndex, durationBeats) {
  var tempo = parseInt(document.getElementById('bpmSlider').value, 10) || 90;
  var msPerBeat = 60000 / tempo;
  targetNotes.push({
    midi: midi,
    beatIndex: beatIndex,
    arriveMs: staffStartTime + beatIndex * msPerBeat,
    durationBeats: durationBeats || 1,
    hit: false
  });
}

function diatonicIndex(midi) {
  var octave = Math.floor(midi / 12) - 1;
  var n = midi % 12;
  var diatonic;
  switch (n) {
    case 0: case 1: diatonic = 0; break;
    case 2: case 3: diatonic = 1; break;
    case 4: diatonic = 2; break;
    case 5: case 6: diatonic = 3; break;
    case 7: case 8: diatonic = 4; break;
    case 9: case 10: diatonic = 5; break;
    case 11: diatonic = 6; break;
    default: diatonic = 0;
  }
  return octave * 7 + diatonic;
}

function isBlackKey(midi) {
  return BLACK_KEY_PATTERN[midi % 12];
}

function drawGrandStaff() {
  var canvas = document.getElementById('grandStaffCanvas');
  if (!canvas) return;
  var ctx = canvas.getContext('2d');
  var dpr = window.devicePixelRatio || 1;
  var rect = canvas.getBoundingClientRect();
  if (!rect.width) return;
  canvas.width = rect.width * dpr;
  canvas.height = rect.height * dpr;
  ctx.setTransform(dpr, 0, 0, dpr, 0, 0);
  var W = rect.width;
  var H = rect.height;
  if (H < 50) return;

  // Read settings
  var tempo = parseInt(document.getElementById('bpmSlider').value, 10) || 90;
  var timeSig = (document.getElementById('staffTimeSig').value || '4/4').split('/');
  var beatsPerMeasure = parseInt(timeSig[0], 10) || 4;
  var beatUnit = parseInt(timeSig[1], 10) || 4;
  var scaleName = document.getElementById('staffScale').value || 'C major';
  var keySigNum = KEY_SIG_MAP[scaleName] || 0;
  var useFlats = keySigNum < 0;
  var keySigSemitones = getKeySigSemitones(scaleName);
  var scaleSemitones = getScaleSemitones(scaleName);
  var msPerBeat = 60000 / tempo;
  var msPerMeasure = msPerBeat * beatsPerMeasure;

  ctx.clearRect(0, 0, W, H);
  ctx.fillStyle = '#050508';
  ctx.fillRect(0, 0, W, H);

  // Diatonic layout: fill canvas from C8 (y=0, top) to A0 (y=H, bottom)
  var highestDi = diatonicIndex(108); // C8
  var lowestDi = diatonicIndex(21);   // A0
  var totalDiRange = highestDi - lowestDi; // 51 diatonic steps
  var halfStep = H / totalDiRange;
  var lineSpacing = halfStep * 2;

  var trebleTopDi = diatonicIndex(TREBLE_LINE_MIDIS[4]);
  var trebleBottomDi = diatonicIndex(TREBLE_LINE_MIDIS[0]);

  function midiToY(midi) {
    var di = diatonicIndex(midi);
    return (highestDi - di) * halfStep;
  }

  // Layout zones
  // Initial estimate for staff line start (clefs drawn over this area)
  var clefW = 44;
  var timeSigW = 22;
  var keySigW = Math.abs(keySigNum) * 10 + 4;
  var nowMs = Date.now();

  // Draw staff lines
  ctx.strokeStyle = '#555555';
  ctx.lineWidth = 1;
  var trebleTop, trebleBottom, bassTop, bassBottom;
  for (var t = 0; t < TREBLE_LINE_MIDIS.length; t++) {
    var y = midiToY(TREBLE_LINE_MIDIS[t]);
    if (t === 0) trebleBottom = y;
    if (t === 4) trebleTop = y;
    ctx.beginPath(); ctx.moveTo(0, y); ctx.lineTo(W, y); ctx.stroke();
  }
  for (var b = 0; b < BASS_LINE_MIDIS.length; b++) {
    var y = midiToY(BASS_LINE_MIDIS[b]);
    if (b === 0) bassBottom = y;
    if (b === 4) bassTop = y;
    ctx.beginPath(); ctx.moveTo(0, y); ctx.lineTo(W, y); ctx.stroke();
  }

  var middleCY = midiToY(60);

  // Clef and time signature references
  var trebleMidY = (trebleTop + trebleBottom) / 2;
  var bassMidY = (bassTop + bassBottom) / 2;
  var trebleG4Y = midiToY(67); // G4 — treble clef reference line
  var bassF3Y = midiToY(53); // F3 — bass clef reference line
  var staffH = trebleBottom - trebleTop; // pixel height of one staff

  // Treble clef — Unicode 𝄞, centered on G4 line
  ctx.fillStyle = '#AAAAAA';
  var trebleClefSize = Math.round(staffH * 0.924 * 1.44);
  ctx.font = trebleClefSize + 'px serif';
  ctx.textBaseline = 'middle';
  var trebleClefX = -4;
  var trebleLineSpacing = (trebleBottom - trebleTop) / 4;
  ctx.fillText('\uD834\uDD1E', trebleClefX, trebleG4Y - trebleLineSpacing * 0.85);
  var trebleClefW = ctx.measureText('\uD834\uDD1E').width;
  // Bass clef — Unicode 𝄢, dots straddle F3 line
  var bassClefSize = Math.round(staffH * 1.008 * 1.2);
  ctx.font = bassClefSize + 'px serif';
  var bassLineSpacing = (bassBottom - bassTop) / 4;
  var bassF3LineY = midiToY(53); // F3 = 4th line from bottom
  var bassClefY = bassF3LineY + bassLineSpacing * 1.5;
  var bassClefX = Math.max(4, trebleClefX + trebleClefW - ctx.measureText('\uD834\uDD22').width);
  ctx.fillText('\uD834\uDD22', bassClefX, bassClefY);
  var bassClefW = ctx.measureText('\uD834\uDD22').width;
  ctx.textBaseline = 'alphabetic';

  // Dynamic clefW based on actual rendered glyph widths
  var actualClefW = Math.max(trebleClefX + trebleClefW, bassClefX + bassClefW) + 6;
  // Recompute margin with actual clef width
  var marginLeft = actualClefW + timeSigW + keySigW + 4;
  var playLineX = marginLeft + (W - marginLeft) * 0.5;
  // Time signature — to the RIGHT of clefs, using measured width
  var tsX = actualClefW;
  var tsFontSize = Math.round(staffH * 0.576);
  ctx.font = 'bold ' + tsFontSize + 'px DM Sans, sans-serif';
  ctx.fillStyle = '#999999';
  ctx.textAlign = 'center';
  ctx.textBaseline = 'middle';
  // Treble staff: top number centered between lines 3(B4) and 5(F5), bottom between 1(E4) and 3(B4)
  var trebleLine3Y = midiToY(TREBLE_LINE_MIDIS[2]); // B4
  ctx.fillText(timeSig[0], tsX + 10, (trebleTop + trebleLine3Y) / 2);
  ctx.fillText(timeSig[1], tsX + 10, (trebleLine3Y + trebleBottom) / 2);
  // Bass staff: top between lines 3(D3) and 5(A3), bottom between 1(G2) and 3(D3)
  var bassLine3Y = midiToY(BASS_LINE_MIDIS[2]); // D3
  ctx.fillText(timeSig[0], tsX + 10, (bassTop + bassLine3Y) / 2);
  ctx.fillText(timeSig[1], tsX + 10, (bassLine3Y + bassBottom) / 2);
  ctx.textAlign = 'left';
  ctx.textBaseline = 'alphabetic';

  // Key signature accidentals — to the right of time signature
  var ksX = actualClefW + timeSigW + 20;
  var absKeySig = Math.abs(keySigNum);
  if (absKeySig > 0) {
    var symbol = useFlats ? '\u266D' : '\u266F';
    var treblePos = useFlats ? TREBLE_FLAT_POS : TREBLE_SHARP_POS;
    var bassPos = useFlats ? BASS_FLAT_POS : BASS_SHARP_POS;
    ctx.font = 'bold 33px serif';
    ctx.fillStyle = '#ffffff';
    ctx.textAlign = 'center';
    ctx.textBaseline = 'middle';
    for (var i = 0; i < absKeySig; i++) {
      var x = ksX + i * 22;
      ctx.fillText(symbol, x, midiToY(treblePos[i]));
      ctx.fillText(symbol, x, midiToY(bassPos[i]));
    }
    ctx.textAlign = 'left';
    ctx.textBaseline = 'alphabetic';
  }

  // Play line (where notes arrive)
  ctx.strokeStyle = 'rgba(0, 200, 100, 0.3)';
  ctx.lineWidth = 2;
  ctx.beginPath();
  ctx.moveTo(playLineX, trebleTop - 10);
  ctx.lineTo(playLineX, bassBottom + 10);
  ctx.stroke();

  // Flowing measure bar lines — scroll from right to left
  // Fixed measure width: always show ~4 measures; BPM controls scroll speed
  var scrollableW = W - playLineX;
  var measuresVisible = 2;
  var measureDurationMs = msPerMeasure;
  var measureWidthPx = scrollableW / measuresVisible;
  var pxPerMs = measureWidthPx / measureDurationMs;
  var scrollWindow = scrollableW / pxPerMs;
  var firstMeasureOffset = nowMs % measureDurationMs;
  var totalMeasures = Math.ceil(scrollWindow / measureDurationMs) + 2;

  for (var m = -1; m < totalMeasures; m++) {
    var measureAge = firstMeasureOffset + m * measureDurationMs;
    var barX = playLineX + (scrollWindow - measureAge) * pxPerMs;
    if (barX < marginLeft || barX > W) continue;

    // Measure bar line across both staves
    ctx.strokeStyle = 'rgba(255,255,255,0.35)';
    ctx.lineWidth = 1.5;
    ctx.beginPath();
    ctx.moveTo(barX, trebleTop);
    ctx.lineTo(barX, trebleBottom);
    ctx.stroke();
    ctx.beginPath();
    ctx.moveTo(barX, bassTop);
    ctx.lineTo(barX, bassBottom);
    ctx.stroke();

    // Beat subdivisions within measure
    for (var beat = 1; beat < beatsPerMeasure; beat++) {
      var beatX = barX - beat * (measureDurationMs / beatsPerMeasure) * pxPerMs;
      if (beatX < marginLeft || beatX > W) continue;
      ctx.strokeStyle = 'rgba(255,255,255,0.12)';
      ctx.lineWidth = 0.5;
      ctx.beginPath();
      ctx.moveTo(beatX, trebleTop);
      ctx.lineTo(beatX, trebleBottom);
      ctx.stroke();
      ctx.beginPath();
      ctx.moveTo(beatX, bassTop);
      ctx.lineTo(beatX, bassBottom);
      ctx.stroke();
    }
  }

  // Middle C ledger line reference (faint dashed)
  ctx.strokeStyle = 'rgba(255,255,255,0.06)';
  ctx.lineWidth = 0.5;
  ctx.setLineDash([4, 4]);
  ctx.beginPath();
  ctx.moveTo(marginLeft, middleCY);
  ctx.lineTo(W, middleCY);
  ctx.stroke();
  ctx.setLineDash([]);

  // Helpers
  var noteRadius = Math.max(3, lineSpacing * 0.4);

  function drawLedgerLines(noteX, noteY) {
    ctx.strokeStyle = '#555555';
    ctx.lineWidth = 1;
    var ledgerHalf = 10;
    if (Math.abs(noteY - middleCY) < halfStep) {
      ctx.beginPath();
      ctx.moveTo(noteX - ledgerHalf, middleCY);
      ctx.lineTo(noteX + ledgerHalf, middleCY);
      ctx.stroke();
    }
    if (noteY < trebleTop - halfStep * 0.5) {
      var ly = trebleTop - lineSpacing;
      while (ly >= noteY - halfStep * 0.5) {
        ctx.beginPath(); ctx.moveTo(noteX - ledgerHalf, ly); ctx.lineTo(noteX + ledgerHalf, ly); ctx.stroke();
        ly -= lineSpacing;
      }
    }
    if (noteY > bassBottom + halfStep * 0.5) {
      var ly = bassBottom + lineSpacing;
      while (ly <= noteY + halfStep * 0.5) {
        ctx.beginPath(); ctx.moveTo(noteX - ledgerHalf, ly); ctx.lineTo(noteX + ledgerHalf, ly); ctx.stroke();
        ly += lineSpacing;
      }
    }
  }

  function drawNoteHead(noteX, noteY, color, radius) {
    // Thin vertical rectangle indicating timing
    var headW = 3;
    var headH = radius * 2.4;
    ctx.fillStyle = color;
    ctx.globalAlpha = 0.95;
    ctx.fillRect(noteX - headW / 2, noteY - headH / 2, headW, headH);
    ctx.globalAlpha = 1.0;
  }

  function drawStem(noteX, noteY, color, radius) {
    var stemUp = noteY > middleCY;
    var stemLen = lineSpacing * 3.5;
    ctx.strokeStyle = color;
    ctx.lineWidth = 1.2;
    ctx.beginPath();
    if (stemUp) {
      ctx.moveTo(noteX + radius - 1, noteY);
      ctx.lineTo(noteX + radius - 1, noteY - stemLen);
    } else {
      ctx.moveTo(noteX - radius + 1, noteY);
      ctx.lineTo(noteX - radius + 1, noteY + stemLen);
    }
    ctx.stroke();
  }

  function drawAccidental(noteX, noteY, midi, color) {
    var semitone = midi % 12;
    // Diatonic notes in the scale need no accidental
    if (scaleSemitones.has(semitone)) return;
    // Black keys not in key signature get sharp/flat
    // White keys not in scale get natural sign (e.g. F natural in G major)
    var symbol;
    if (isBlackKey(midi)) {
      if (keySigSemitones.has(semitone)) return; // already in key sig
      symbol = useFlats ? '\u266D' : '\u266F';
    } else {
      // White key that's non-diatonic — needs natural sign
      symbol = '\u266E';
    }
    ctx.font = 'bold 22px serif';
    ctx.fillStyle = '#ffffff';
    ctx.textAlign = 'center';
    ctx.textBaseline = 'middle';
    ctx.fillText(symbol, noteX - 14, noteY);
    ctx.textAlign = 'left';
    ctx.textBaseline = 'alphabetic';
  }

  // --- TARGET NOTES flowing from right ---
  for (var ti = 0; ti < targetNotes.length; ti++) {
    var tn = targetNotes[ti];
    var timeUntilArrive = tn.arriveMs - nowMs;
    if (timeUntilArrive < -2000) continue; // past and gone
    if (timeUntilArrive > scrollWindow) continue; // not visible yet

    var tnX = playLineX + timeUntilArrive * pxPerMs;
    if (tnX < marginLeft || tnX > W) continue;

    var tnY = midiToY(tn.midi);
    var tnAlpha = tn.hit ? 0.15 : (timeUntilArrive < 0 ? Math.max(0.2, 1 + timeUntilArrive / 2000) : 0.6);
    var tnColor = tn.hit ? 'rgba(0,200,100,' + tnAlpha + ')' : 'rgba(100,150,255,' + tnAlpha + ')';

    drawLedgerLines(tnX, tnY);
    drawAccidental(tnX, tnY, tn.midi, tnColor);
    // Hollow note head for targets
    ctx.beginPath();
    ctx.arc(tnX, tnY, noteRadius, 0, Math.PI * 2);
    ctx.strokeStyle = tnColor;
    ctx.lineWidth = 1.5;
    ctx.stroke();
  }

  // --- PLAYED NOTES (active) — head scrolls left from play line, tail extends to play line ---
  activeNotes.forEach(function(noteData, midi) {
    if (midi < FIRST_MIDI || midi > FIRST_MIDI + TOTAL_KEYS - 1) return;
    var noteY = midiToY(midi);
    var color = dynamicsColor(noteData.velocity);
    var holdMs = nowMs - noteData.timestamp;
    var headPx = holdMs * pxPerMs;
    var headX = Math.max(marginLeft, playLineX - headPx);
    var tailLen = playLineX - headX;

    if (tailLen > 2) {
      // Check if finger released but pedal sustaining — split bright/dim segments
      var histEntry = null;
      for (var hi = noteHistory.length - 1; hi >= 0; hi--) {
        if (noteHistory[hi].note === midi && noteHistory[hi].endMs === 0) {
          histEntry = noteHistory[hi]; break;
        }
      }
      var barH = noteRadius * 1.4;
      var barY = noteY - noteRadius * 0.7;
      var c = dynamicsRgb(noteData.velocity);
      var breathe = 0.8 + 0.2 * Math.sin(nowMs / 400 + midi * 0.5);
      if (histEntry && histEntry.fingerDurationMs > 0) {
        // Finger released, pedal sustaining — draw two segments
        var fingerMs = histEntry.fingerDurationMs;
        var fingerEndX = Math.max(headX, playLineX - (holdMs - fingerMs) * pxPerMs);
        // Finger-held segment: inner gradient matching waterfall style
        if (fingerEndX > headX) {
          var fW = fingerEndX - headX;
          var fGrad = ctx.createLinearGradient(0, barY, 0, barY + barH);
          fGrad.addColorStop(0, 'rgba(' + c.r + ',' + c.g + ',' + c.b + ',0.9)');
          fGrad.addColorStop(0.3, 'rgba(' + Math.round(c.r * 0.7) + ',' + Math.round(c.g * 0.7) + ',' + Math.round(c.b * 0.7) + ',0.7)');
          fGrad.addColorStop(0.7, 'rgba(' + Math.round(c.r * 0.7) + ',' + Math.round(c.g * 0.7) + ',' + Math.round(c.b * 0.7) + ',0.7)');
          fGrad.addColorStop(1, 'rgba(' + c.r + ',' + c.g + ',' + c.b + ',0.9)');
          ctx.fillStyle = fGrad;
          ctx.fillRect(headX, barY, fW, barH);
          // Bright edge highlights (top/bottom)
          ctx.fillStyle = 'rgba(' + c.r + ',' + c.g + ',' + c.b + ',0.6)';
          ctx.fillRect(headX, barY, fW, 1);
          ctx.fillRect(headX, barY + barH - 1, fW, 1);
          // Thin start bar
          ctx.fillStyle = color;
          ctx.globalAlpha = 0.95;
          ctx.fillRect(headX, barY, 3, barH);
          ctx.globalAlpha = 1.0;
        }
        // Pedal-sustained segment: filled bar with glowing rim
        if (playLineX > fingerEndX) {
          var pedalW = playLineX - fingerEndX;
          // Interior fill — visible but dimmer than finger-held
          ctx.fillStyle = darkenedColor(noteData.velocity, 0.4);
          ctx.globalAlpha = 0.4;
          ctx.fillRect(fingerEndX, barY, pedalW, barH);
          // Thick glowing rim synced with finger breathing
          ctx.strokeStyle = color;
          ctx.globalAlpha = 0.7 * breathe;
          ctx.lineWidth = 2.5;
          ctx.shadowColor = color;
          ctx.shadowBlur = 8 * breathe;
          ctx.strokeRect(fingerEndX, barY, pedalW, barH);
          ctx.shadowBlur = 0;
        }
        ctx.globalAlpha = 1.0;
      } else {
        // Finger still held — inner gradient fill matching waterfall style
        var fGrad = ctx.createLinearGradient(0, barY, 0, barY + barH);
        fGrad.addColorStop(0, 'rgba(' + c.r + ',' + c.g + ',' + c.b + ',0.9)');
        fGrad.addColorStop(0.3, 'rgba(' + Math.round(c.r * 0.7) + ',' + Math.round(c.g * 0.7) + ',' + Math.round(c.b * 0.7) + ',0.7)');
        fGrad.addColorStop(0.7, 'rgba(' + Math.round(c.r * 0.7) + ',' + Math.round(c.g * 0.7) + ',' + Math.round(c.b * 0.7) + ',0.7)');
        fGrad.addColorStop(1, 'rgba(' + c.r + ',' + c.g + ',' + c.b + ',0.9)');
        ctx.fillStyle = fGrad;
        ctx.fillRect(headX, barY, tailLen, barH);
        // Bright edge highlights (top/bottom of bar)
        ctx.fillStyle = 'rgba(' + c.r + ',' + c.g + ',' + c.b + ',0.6)';
        ctx.fillRect(headX, barY, tailLen, 1);
        ctx.fillRect(headX, barY + barH - 1, tailLen, 1);
        // Thin start bar
        ctx.fillStyle = color;
        ctx.globalAlpha = 0.95;
        ctx.fillRect(headX, barY, 3, barH);
        ctx.globalAlpha = 1.0;
      }
    }

    drawLedgerLines(headX, noteY);
    drawAccidental(headX, noteY, midi, color);
    drawNoteHead(headX, noteY, color, noteRadius);
  });

  // --- NOTE HISTORY scrolling left from play line at tempo speed ---
  var maxLeftPx = playLineX - marginLeft;
  for (var i = noteHistory.length - 1; i >= 0; i--) {
    var entry = noteHistory[i];
    var age = nowMs - entry.startMs;
    var offsetPx = age * pxPerMs; // same speed as measure bar flow
    if (offsetPx > maxLeftPx) break;
    if (entry.endMs === 0) continue; // skip currently-active note (drawn at play line)

    var noteY = midiToY(entry.note);
    var noteX = playLineX - offsetPx;
    if (noteX < marginLeft) continue;

    // Draw duration tail for history notes — match waterfall brightness rules
    var duration = (entry.endMs || nowMs) - entry.startMs;
    var durationPx = duration * pxPerMs;
    var tailEndX = Math.min(playLineX, noteX + durationPx);

    var t = offsetPx / maxLeftPx;
    var alpha = Math.max(0.1, 1 - t);
    var headColor = dynamicsColor(entry.velocity, alpha);
    var pedalAlpha = alpha * 0.5;

    var histBarH = noteRadius * 1.4;
    var histBarY = noteY - noteRadius * 0.7;
    var hc = dynamicsRgb(entry.velocity);
    if (durationPx > 2) {
      var fingerEndMs = (entry.fingerDurationMs > 0) ? entry.startMs + entry.fingerDurationMs : null;
      if (fingerEndMs && fingerEndMs < entry.endMs) {
        // Finger-held segment: inner gradient matching waterfall style
        var fingerEndAge = nowMs - fingerEndMs;
        var fingerEndX = Math.min(playLineX, playLineX - fingerEndAge * pxPerMs);
        if (fingerEndX > noteX) {
          var fSegW = fingerEndX - noteX;
          var fGrad = ctx.createLinearGradient(0, histBarY, 0, histBarY + histBarH);
          fGrad.addColorStop(0, 'rgba(' + hc.r + ',' + hc.g + ',' + hc.b + ',0.9)');
          fGrad.addColorStop(0.3, 'rgba(' + Math.round(hc.r * 0.7) + ',' + Math.round(hc.g * 0.7) + ',' + Math.round(hc.b * 0.7) + ',0.7)');
          fGrad.addColorStop(0.7, 'rgba(' + Math.round(hc.r * 0.7) + ',' + Math.round(hc.g * 0.7) + ',' + Math.round(hc.b * 0.7) + ',0.7)');
          fGrad.addColorStop(1, 'rgba(' + hc.r + ',' + hc.g + ',' + hc.b + ',0.9)');
          ctx.fillStyle = fGrad;
          ctx.fillRect(noteX, histBarY, fSegW, histBarH);
          // Bright edge highlights (top/bottom)
          ctx.fillStyle = 'rgba(' + hc.r + ',' + hc.g + ',' + hc.b + ',0.6)';
          ctx.fillRect(noteX, histBarY, fSegW, 1);
          ctx.fillRect(noteX, histBarY + histBarH - 1, fSegW, 1);
          // Thin start bar
          ctx.fillStyle = dynamicsColor(entry.velocity);
          ctx.globalAlpha = 0.9;
          ctx.fillRect(noteX, histBarY, 2, histBarH);
          ctx.globalAlpha = 1.0;
        }
        // Pedal-sustained segment: filled bar with glowing rim, square edges
        if (tailEndX > fingerEndX) {
          var pedalW = tailEndX - fingerEndX;
          var histColor = dynamicsColor(entry.velocity);
          var pulse = 0.8 + 0.2 * Math.sin(nowMs / 400 + entry.note * 0.5);
          // Interior fill
          ctx.fillStyle = darkenedColor(entry.velocity, 0.4);
          ctx.globalAlpha = 0.4 * alpha;
          ctx.fillRect(fingerEndX, histBarY, pedalW, histBarH);
          // Thick glowing rim
          ctx.strokeStyle = histColor;
          ctx.globalAlpha = 0.7 * pulse * alpha;
          ctx.lineWidth = 2.5;
          ctx.shadowColor = histColor;
          ctx.shadowBlur = 8 * pulse * alpha;
          ctx.strokeRect(fingerEndX, histBarY, pedalW, histBarH);
          ctx.shadowBlur = 0;
        }
        ctx.globalAlpha = 1.0;
      } else {
        // No pedal sustain — inner gradient fill matching waterfall style
        var nopedalW = tailEndX - noteX;
        var fGrad = ctx.createLinearGradient(0, histBarY, 0, histBarY + histBarH);
        fGrad.addColorStop(0, 'rgba(' + hc.r + ',' + hc.g + ',' + hc.b + ',0.9)');
        fGrad.addColorStop(0.3, 'rgba(' + Math.round(hc.r * 0.7) + ',' + Math.round(hc.g * 0.7) + ',' + Math.round(hc.b * 0.7) + ',0.7)');
        fGrad.addColorStop(0.7, 'rgba(' + Math.round(hc.r * 0.7) + ',' + Math.round(hc.g * 0.7) + ',' + Math.round(hc.b * 0.7) + ',0.7)');
        fGrad.addColorStop(1, 'rgba(' + hc.r + ',' + hc.g + ',' + hc.b + ',0.9)');
        ctx.fillStyle = fGrad;
        ctx.fillRect(noteX, histBarY, nopedalW, histBarH);
        // Bright edge highlights (top/bottom)
        ctx.fillStyle = 'rgba(' + hc.r + ',' + hc.g + ',' + hc.b + ',0.6)';
        ctx.fillRect(noteX, histBarY, nopedalW, 1);
        ctx.fillRect(noteX, histBarY + histBarH - 1, nopedalW, 1);
        // Thin start bar
        ctx.fillStyle = dynamicsColor(entry.velocity);
        ctx.globalAlpha = 0.9;
        ctx.fillRect(noteX, histBarY, 2, histBarH);
        ctx.globalAlpha = 1.0;
      }
    }

    if (alpha > 0.3) drawLedgerLines(noteX, noteY);
    if (alpha > 0.3) drawAccidental(noteX, noteY, entry.note, dynamicsColor(entry.velocity, alpha * 0.8));
    drawNoteHead(noteX, noteY, headColor, noteRadius * (0.6 + 0.4 * (1 - t)));
  }

  // Left margin overlay to clean up clef area
  ctx.fillStyle = '#050508';
  ctx.fillRect(0, 0, marginLeft - 2, H);

  // Redraw clefs and key sig on top (same as initial draw)
  ctx.fillStyle = '#AAAAAA';
  ctx.textBaseline = 'middle';
  ctx.font = trebleClefSize + 'px serif';
  ctx.fillText('\uD834\uDD1E', trebleClefX, trebleG4Y - trebleLineSpacing * 0.85);
  ctx.font = bassClefSize + 'px serif';
  ctx.fillText('\uD834\uDD22', bassClefX, bassClefY);
  ctx.textBaseline = 'alphabetic';

  // Redraw time sig
  ctx.font = 'bold ' + tsFontSize + 'px DM Sans, sans-serif';
  ctx.fillStyle = '#999999';
  ctx.textAlign = 'center';
  ctx.textBaseline = 'middle';
  ctx.fillText(timeSig[0], tsX + 10, (trebleTop + trebleLine3Y) / 2);
  ctx.fillText(timeSig[1], tsX + 10, (trebleLine3Y + trebleBottom) / 2);
  ctx.fillText(timeSig[0], tsX + 10, (bassTop + bassLine3Y) / 2);
  ctx.fillText(timeSig[1], tsX + 10, (bassLine3Y + bassBottom) / 2);
  ctx.textAlign = 'left';
  ctx.textBaseline = 'alphabetic';

  // Redraw key sig
  if (absKeySig > 0) {
    var symbol = useFlats ? '\u266D' : '\u266F';
    var treblePos = useFlats ? TREBLE_FLAT_POS : TREBLE_SHARP_POS;
    var bassPos = useFlats ? BASS_FLAT_POS : BASS_SHARP_POS;
    ctx.font = 'bold 33px serif';
    ctx.fillStyle = '#ffffff';
    ctx.textAlign = 'center';
    ctx.textBaseline = 'middle';
    for (var i = 0; i < absKeySig; i++) {
      var x = ksX + i * 22;
      ctx.fillText(symbol, x, midiToY(treblePos[i]));
      ctx.fillText(symbol, x, midiToY(bassPos[i]));
    }
    ctx.textAlign = 'left';
    ctx.textBaseline = 'alphabetic';
  }

  // Redraw staff lines in clef area (full width from left edge)
  ctx.strokeStyle = '#555555';
  ctx.lineWidth = 1;
  for (var t = 0; t < TREBLE_LINE_MIDIS.length; t++) {
    var y = midiToY(TREBLE_LINE_MIDIS[t]);
    ctx.beginPath(); ctx.moveTo(0, y); ctx.lineTo(marginLeft - 2, y); ctx.stroke();
  }
  for (var b = 0; b < BASS_LINE_MIDIS.length; b++) {
    var y = midiToY(BASS_LINE_MIDIS[b]);
    ctx.beginPath(); ctx.moveTo(0, y); ctx.lineTo(marginLeft - 2, y); ctx.stroke();
  }
}

function drawKeyboard() {
  var canvas = document.getElementById('keyboardCanvas');
  var ctx = canvas.getContext('2d');
  var dpr = window.devicePixelRatio || 1;
  var rect = canvas.getBoundingClientRect();
  if (!rect.width) return;
  canvas.width = rect.width * dpr;
  canvas.height = rect.height * dpr;
  ctx.setTransform(dpr, 0, 0, dpr, 0, 0);
  var W = rect.width;
  var totalH = rect.height;
  if (totalH < 50) return;
  var dynamicsH = Math.round(totalH * 0.5); // top 50% for dynamic bars (same height as keyboard)
  var keyboardH = totalH - dynamicsH; // bottom 50% for keys
  var keyTop = dynamicsH; // keys start below dynamics zone
  var whiteKeyW = W / WHITE_KEYS_COUNT;
  var blackKeyW = whiteKeyW * 0.6;
  var blackKeyH = keyboardH * 0.62;

  ctx.clearRect(0, 0, W, totalH);

  // --- Dynamic bars zone (above keyboard) ---
  ctx.fillStyle = '#050508';
  ctx.fillRect(0, 0, W, dynamicsH);

  // Dynamics guide lines
  ctx.font = 'bold 18px DM Sans, sans-serif';
  DYNAMICS_LABELS.forEach(function(dl) {
    var y = keyTop - (dl.vel / 127) * dynamicsH;
    ctx.strokeStyle = dynamicsColor(dl.vel, 0.5);
    ctx.lineWidth = 0.8;
    ctx.beginPath();
    ctx.moveTo(0, y);
    ctx.lineTo(W, y);
    ctx.stroke();
    ctx.fillStyle = dynamicsColor(dl.vel, 0.7);
    ctx.fillText(dl.label, 3, y - 3);
  });

  // Dynamic bars — grow upward from keyboard top
  var nowMsDyn = Date.now();
  function drawDynBars(blackOnly) {
    activeNotes.forEach(function(note, midi) {
      var keyInfo = KEY_BY_MIDI.get(midi);
      if (!keyInfo || keyInfo.isBlack !== blackOnly) return;
      var barH = (note.velocity / 127) * (dynamicsH - 2);
      var barX = keyInfo.isBlack
        ? (keyInfo.whiteIndex + 1) * whiteKeyW - blackKeyW / 2
        : keyInfo.whiteIndex * whiteKeyW + 1;
      var barW = keyInfo.isBlack ? blackKeyW : whiteKeyW - 2;
      var barTop = keyTop - barH;
      var isFingerDown = fingerDownNotes.has(midi);
      var color = isFingerDown ? dynamicsColor(note.velocity) : darkenedColor(note.velocity, 0.5);
      var dc = dynamicsRgb(note.velocity);
      if (keyInfo.isBlack) {
        ctx.fillStyle = '#050508';
        ctx.fillRect(barX, 0, barW, dynamicsH);
      }
      if (isFingerDown) {
        // Finger held: inner gradient (bright edges, darker center) + glow
        var dGrad = ctx.createLinearGradient(barX, 0, barX + barW, 0);
        dGrad.addColorStop(0, 'rgba(' + dc.r + ',' + dc.g + ',' + dc.b + ',0.9)');
        dGrad.addColorStop(0.35, 'rgba(' + Math.round(dc.r * 0.6) + ',' + Math.round(dc.g * 0.6) + ',' + Math.round(dc.b * 0.6) + ',0.6)');
        dGrad.addColorStop(0.65, 'rgba(' + Math.round(dc.r * 0.6) + ',' + Math.round(dc.g * 0.6) + ',' + Math.round(dc.b * 0.6) + ',0.6)');
        dGrad.addColorStop(1, 'rgba(' + dc.r + ',' + dc.g + ',' + dc.b + ',0.9)');
        ctx.fillStyle = dGrad;
        ctx.shadowColor = color;
        ctx.shadowBlur = 8;
        ctx.fillRect(barX, barTop, barW, barH);
        ctx.shadowBlur = 0;
        // Bright top cap
        ctx.fillStyle = 'rgba(' + dc.r + ',' + dc.g + ',' + dc.b + ',0.95)';
        ctx.fillRect(barX, barTop, barW, 2);
      } else {
        // Pedal sustained: filled bar with glowing rim
        var pulse = 0.8 + 0.2 * Math.sin(nowMsDyn / 400 + midi * 0.5);
        ctx.fillStyle = darkenedColor(note.velocity, 0.4);
        ctx.globalAlpha = 0.4;
        ctx.fillRect(barX, barTop, barW, barH);
        ctx.strokeStyle = color;
        ctx.globalAlpha = 0.7 * pulse;
        ctx.lineWidth = 2;
        ctx.shadowColor = color;
        ctx.shadowBlur = 8 * pulse;
        ctx.strokeRect(barX, barTop, barW, barH);
        ctx.shadowBlur = 0;
        ctx.globalAlpha = 1.0;
      }
    });
  }
  drawDynBars(false);
  drawDynBars(true);

  // Target note dynamic bars — ghost indicators showing expected velocity
  var nowMsKb = Date.now();
  for (var ti = 0; ti < targetNotes.length; ti++) {
    var tn = targetNotes[ti];
    var timeUntil = tn.arriveMs - nowMsKb;
    if (timeUntil < -500 || timeUntil > 3000) continue;
    if (tn.hit) continue;
    var keyInfo = KEY_BY_MIDI.get(tn.midi);
    if (!keyInfo) continue;
    var vel = tn.velocity || 64;
    var barH = (vel / 127) * (dynamicsH - 2);
    var barX = keyInfo.isBlack
      ? (keyInfo.whiteIndex + 1) * whiteKeyW - blackKeyW / 2
      : keyInfo.whiteIndex * whiteKeyW + 1;
    var barW = keyInfo.isBlack ? blackKeyW : whiteKeyW - 2;
    // Fade in as note approaches (3s → 0s = 0.15 → 0.5 alpha)
    var approachAlpha = Math.min(0.5, Math.max(0.15, 1 - timeUntil / 3000));
    // Pulsing outline
    var pulse = 0.7 + 0.3 * Math.sin(nowMsKb / 500 + tn.midi * 0.3);
    ctx.strokeStyle = dynamicsColor(vel, approachAlpha * pulse);
    ctx.lineWidth = 1.5;
    ctx.setLineDash([3, 3]);
    ctx.strokeRect(barX, keyTop - barH, barW, barH);
    ctx.setLineDash([]);
    // Faint fill
    ctx.fillStyle = dynamicsColor(vel, approachAlpha * 0.1);
    ctx.fillRect(barX, keyTop - barH, barW, barH);
  }

  // --- Keyboard keys ---
  ctx.fillStyle = '#0a0a0a';
  ctx.fillRect(0, keyTop, W, keyboardH);

  var scaleName = document.getElementById('staffScale').value || 'C major';
  var scaleSemitones = getScaleSemitones(scaleName);

  KEYBOARD.forEach(function(key) {
    if (key.isBlack) return;
    var x = key.whiteIndex * whiteKeyW;
    var active = activeNotes.get(key.midi);
    var isPedalOnly = active && !fingerDownNotes.has(key.midi) && pedalSustainedNotes.has(key.midi);
    var inScale = scaleSemitones.has(key.midi % 12);

    if (active) {
      ctx.fillStyle = isPedalOnly ? darkenedColor(active.velocity, 0.75) : dynamicsColor(active.velocity);
      ctx.shadowColor = isPedalOnly ? darkenedColor(active.velocity, 0.75) : dynamicsColor(active.velocity);
      ctx.shadowBlur = 10;
    } else {
      ctx.fillStyle = inScale ? '#f4f4f4' : '#b8b8b8';
      ctx.shadowBlur = 0;
    }

    ctx.fillRect(x + 0.5, keyTop, whiteKeyW - 1, keyboardH - 1);
    ctx.strokeStyle = 'rgba(0,0,0,0.22)';
    ctx.lineWidth = 0.5;
    ctx.strokeRect(x + 0.5, keyTop, whiteKeyW - 1, keyboardH - 1);
    // Scale indicator: colored bottom strip + dot
    if (inScale && !active) {
      ctx.fillStyle = 'rgba(80,160,255,0.25)';
      ctx.fillRect(x + 0.5, keyTop + keyboardH - 5, whiteKeyW - 1, 4);
      ctx.beginPath();
      ctx.arc(x + whiteKeyW / 2, keyTop + keyboardH - 8, 2, 0, Math.PI * 2);
      ctx.fillStyle = 'rgba(100,180,255,0.6)';
      ctx.fill();
    }
  });

  ctx.shadowBlur = 0;
  KEYBOARD.forEach(function(key) {
    if (!key.isBlack) return;
    var x = (key.whiteIndex + 1) * whiteKeyW - blackKeyW / 2;
    var active = activeNotes.get(key.midi);
    var isPedalOnly = active && !fingerDownNotes.has(key.midi) && pedalSustainedNotes.has(key.midi);
    var inScale = scaleSemitones.has(key.midi % 12);

    if (active) {
      ctx.fillStyle = isPedalOnly ? darkenedColor(active.velocity, 0.75) : dynamicsColor(active.velocity);
      ctx.shadowColor = isPedalOnly ? darkenedColor(active.velocity, 0.75) : dynamicsColor(active.velocity);
      ctx.shadowBlur = 10;
    } else {
      ctx.fillStyle = inScale ? '#111111' : '#444444';
      ctx.shadowBlur = 0;
    }

    ctx.fillRect(x, keyTop, blackKeyW, blackKeyH);
    ctx.shadowBlur = 0;
    // Scale indicator: small dot on diatonic black keys
    if (inScale && !active) {
      ctx.beginPath();
      ctx.arc(x + blackKeyW / 2, keyTop + blackKeyH - 6, 1.5, 0, Math.PI * 2);
      ctx.fillStyle = 'rgba(100,180,255,0.7)';
      ctx.fill();
    }
    ctx.strokeStyle = 'rgba(255,255,255,0.08)';
    ctx.lineWidth = 0.5;
    ctx.strokeRect(x, keyTop, blackKeyW, blackKeyH);
  });
}

function updateLevelMeter() {
  if (!analyser) return;
  var data = new Uint8Array(analyser.fftSize);
  analyser.getByteTimeDomainData(data);
  var max = 0;
  for (var i = 0; i < data.length; i++) { var v = Math.abs(data[i] - 128); if (v > max) max = v; }
  var pct = Math.min(100, (max / 128) * 100);
  document.getElementById('levelBar').style.width = pct + '%';
  document.getElementById('levelLabel').textContent = Math.round(pct);
}

// Score Browser & Sheet Music Renderer

var currentScore = null;
var scoreColorMode = false;
var scorePlaybackTimer = null;

function loadScoreTree() {
  fetch('/api/sheets').then(function(r) { return r.json(); }).then(function(tree) {
    var el = document.getElementById('scoreTree');
    el.innerHTML = '';
    renderTree(el, tree);
  }).catch(function() {
    document.getElementById('scoreTree').innerHTML = '<div style="color:var(--text3);font-size:10px;">No sheets found</div>';
  });
}

function renderTree(parent, items) {
  items.forEach(function(item) {
    if (item.type === 'folder') {
      var folder = document.createElement('div');
      folder.className = 'score-tree-folder';
      var name = document.createElement('div');
      name.className = 'score-tree-folder-name';
      name.innerHTML = '<span style="font-size:10px;">📁</span> ' + item.name;
      var children = document.createElement('div');
      children.className = 'score-tree-children';
      name.onclick = function() { children.style.display = children.style.display === 'none' ? '' : 'none'; };
      folder.appendChild(name);
      folder.appendChild(children);
      renderTree(children, item.children);
      parent.appendChild(folder);
    } else {
      var file = document.createElement('div');
      file.className = 'score-tree-file';
      file.innerHTML = '<span style="font-size:10px;">♫</span> ' + item.name;
      file.onclick = function() {
        document.querySelectorAll('.score-tree-file.active').forEach(function(f) { f.classList.remove('active'); });
        file.classList.add('active');
        loadScore(item.path);
      };
      parent.appendChild(file);
    }
  });
}

function loadScore(filePath) {
  fetch('/sheets/' + filePath).then(function(r) { return r.json(); }).then(function(score) {
    currentScore = score;
    var preview = document.getElementById('scorePreview');
    preview.style.display = '';
    var info = document.getElementById('scoreInfo');
    info.innerHTML = '<div class="title">' + score.title + '</div>' +
      '<div class="composer">' + score.composer + '</div>' +
      '<div class="meta">' + score.key + ' · ' + score.timeSig + ' · ♩ = ' + score.tempo + '</div>';
    drawScorePreview(score);
  });
}

function drawScorePreview(score) {
  var canvas = document.getElementById('scoreCanvas');
  var ctx = canvas.getContext('2d');
  var dpr = window.devicePixelRatio || 1;
  var rect = canvas.getBoundingClientRect();
  if (!rect.width) return;
  var measuresPerLine = 2;
  var lineH = 90;
  var lines = Math.ceil(score.measures.length / measuresPerLine);
  var totalH = lines * lineH + 20;
  canvas.width = rect.width * dpr;
  canvas.height = totalH * dpr;
  ctx.setTransform(dpr, 0, 0, dpr, 0, 0);
  var W = rect.width;

  ctx.clearRect(0, 0, W, totalH);
  ctx.fillStyle = '#050508';
  ctx.fillRect(0, 0, W, totalH);

  var staffSpacing = 6;
  var measureW = (W - 20) / measuresPerLine;

  for (var line = 0; line < lines; line++) {
    var baseY = line * lineH + 20;

    // Draw treble staff lines
    ctx.strokeStyle = '#444';
    ctx.lineWidth = 0.5;
    for (var s = 0; s < 5; s++) {
      var y = baseY + s * staffSpacing;
      ctx.beginPath(); ctx.moveTo(10, y); ctx.lineTo(W - 10, y); ctx.stroke();
    }
    // Bass staff
    var bassBaseY = baseY + 5 * staffSpacing + 10;
    for (var s = 0; s < 5; s++) {
      var y = bassBaseY + s * staffSpacing;
      ctx.beginPath(); ctx.moveTo(10, y); ctx.lineTo(W - 10, y); ctx.stroke();
    }

    // Clef symbols
    ctx.fillStyle = '#888';
    ctx.font = '18px serif';
    ctx.fillText('\uD834\uDD1E', 2, baseY + 3 * staffSpacing + 2); // treble clef
    ctx.font = '14px serif';
    ctx.fillText('\uD834\uDD22', 2, bassBaseY + 2 * staffSpacing + 2); // bass clef

    // Draw notes for each measure in this line
    for (var m = 0; m < measuresPerLine; m++) {
      var mIdx = line * measuresPerLine + m;
      if (mIdx >= score.measures.length) break;
      var measure = score.measures[mIdx];
      var mX = 10 + m * measureW;

      // Measure bar line
      ctx.strokeStyle = '#555';
      ctx.lineWidth = 1;
      ctx.beginPath();
      ctx.moveTo(mX + measureW, baseY);
      ctx.lineTo(mX + measureW, bassBaseY + 4 * staffSpacing);
      ctx.stroke();

      // Draw notes
      var beatsInMeasure = score.beatsPerMeasure || parseInt(score.timeSig.split('/')[0]);
      measure.notes.forEach(function(note) {
        var noteX = mX + 16 + (note.beat / beatsInMeasure) * (measureW - 24);
        // Use clef field to force staff, else auto by MIDI
        var forceBass = note.clef === 'bass';
        var noteY = forceBass
          ? scoreNoteY(note.midi, bassBaseY - 100, bassBaseY, staffSpacing) // force bass rendering
          : scoreNoteY(note.midi, baseY, bassBaseY, staffSpacing);

        // Color mode: velocity-based coloring
        if (scoreColorMode) {
          var vel = note.vel || 80;
          ctx.fillStyle = dynamicsColor(vel);
        } else {
          ctx.fillStyle = note.clef === 'bass' ? '#999999' : '#DDDDDD';
        }

        // Accidental symbol
        if (note.acc) {
          ctx.font = '10px serif';
          ctx.fillText(note.acc === '#' ? '\u266F' : '\u266D', noteX - 10, noteY + 3);
        }

        // Note head — filled for short, hollow for long
        ctx.beginPath();
        ctx.ellipse(noteX, noteY, 4, 3, -0.3, 0, Math.PI * 2);
        if (note.dur >= 2) {
          ctx.strokeStyle = ctx.fillStyle;
          ctx.lineWidth = 1.2;
          ctx.stroke();
        } else {
          ctx.fill();
        }

        // Stem
        ctx.strokeStyle = ctx.fillStyle;
        ctx.lineWidth = 1;
        ctx.beginPath();
        if (noteY > baseY + 2 * staffSpacing) {
          ctx.moveTo(noteX + 3.5, noteY);
          ctx.lineTo(noteX + 3.5, noteY - 20);
        } else {
          ctx.moveTo(noteX - 3.5, noteY);
          ctx.lineTo(noteX - 3.5, noteY + 20);
        }
        ctx.stroke();

        // Ledger lines if needed
        drawScoreLedgerLines(ctx, noteX, noteY, baseY, bassBaseY, staffSpacing);
      });
    }
  }
}

function scoreNoteY(midi, trebleBaseY, bassBaseY, sp) {
  // Map MIDI to staff Y using diatonic coordinate system
  // Treble lines: E4(64)=bottom, F5(77)=top
  // Bass lines: G2(43)=bottom, A3(57)=top
  var NOTE_OFFSETS = { 0:0, 2:1, 4:2, 5:3, 7:4, 9:5, 11:6 }; // C,D,E,F,G,A,B
  var pc = midi % 12;
  var octave = Math.floor(midi / 12) - 1;
  // Black keys map to the lower natural's diatonic position
  var diatonic = NOTE_OFFSETS[pc] !== undefined ? NOTE_OFFSETS[pc] : NOTE_OFFSETS[pc - 1];
  var stepsFromC4 = (octave - 4) * 7 + diatonic;

  // Treble: E4 = step 2, bottom line (trebleBaseY + 4*sp)
  if (trebleBaseY < bassBaseY && midi >= 60) {
    return trebleBaseY + 4 * sp - (stepsFromC4 - 2) * (sp / 2);
  }
  // Bass: D3 = step -5, middle line (bassBaseY + 2*sp)
  return bassBaseY + 2 * sp - (stepsFromC4 + 5) * (sp / 2);
}

function drawScoreLedgerLines(ctx, x, y, trebleBase, bassBase, sp) {
  var trebleBottom = trebleBase + 4 * sp;
  var bassTop = bassBase;
  var bassBottom = bassBase + 4 * sp;
  ctx.strokeStyle = '#666';
  ctx.lineWidth = 0.8;

  // Above treble
  for (var ly = trebleBase - sp; ly >= y - 1; ly -= sp) {
    ctx.beginPath(); ctx.moveTo(x - 6, ly); ctx.lineTo(x + 6, ly); ctx.stroke();
  }
  // Below treble / above bass (middle C area)
  for (var ly = trebleBottom + sp; ly <= y + 1; ly += sp) {
    if (ly < bassTop) {
      ctx.beginPath(); ctx.moveTo(x - 6, ly); ctx.lineTo(x + 6, ly); ctx.stroke();
    }
  }
  // Below bass
  for (var ly = bassBottom + sp; ly <= y + 1; ly += sp) {
    ctx.beginPath(); ctx.moveTo(x - 6, ly); ctx.lineTo(x + 6, ly); ctx.stroke();
  }
}

function loadScoreToTargets() {
  if (!currentScore) return;
  // Clear existing targets
  targetNotes.length = 0;

  var tempo = currentScore.tempo;
  var msPerBeat = 60000 / tempo;
  var timeSigParts = currentScore.timeSig.split('/');
  var beatsPerMeasure = parseInt(timeSigParts[0]);
  var startMs = Date.now() + 2000; // 2 second lead-in

  // Set staff tempo/time sig/scale to match score
  document.getElementById('bpmSlider').value = tempo;
  document.getElementById('bpmVal').textContent = tempo;
  var timeSigSelect = document.getElementById('staffTimeSig');
  for (var i = 0; i < timeSigSelect.options.length; i++) {
    if (timeSigSelect.options[i].value === currentScore.timeSig) {
      timeSigSelect.selectedIndex = i; break;
    }
  }
  var scaleSelect = document.getElementById('staffScale');
  for (var i = 0; i < scaleSelect.options.length; i++) {
    if (scaleSelect.options[i].value === currentScore.key) {
      scaleSelect.selectedIndex = i; break;
    }
  }

  // Map dynamics markings to MIDI velocity
  var dynamicsToVelocity = { 'ppp': 16, 'pp': 32, 'p': 48, 'mp': 64, 'mf': 80, 'f': 96, 'ff': 112, 'fff': 127 };
  var currentVelocity = dynamicsToVelocity[currentScore.dynamics] || 64;

  currentScore.measures.forEach(function(measure, mIdx) {
    if (measure.dynamics && dynamicsToVelocity[measure.dynamics]) {
      currentVelocity = dynamicsToVelocity[measure.dynamics];
    }
    var measureStartMs = startMs + mIdx * beatsPerMeasure * msPerBeat;
    measure.notes.forEach(function(note) {
      targetNotes.push({
        midi: note.midi,
        arriveMs: measureStartMs + note.beat * msPerBeat,
        durationBeats: note.dur,
        velocity: note.velocity || currentVelocity,
        hit: false
      });
    });
  });

  // Update button
  document.getElementById('scoreLoadBtn').classList.add('active');
  document.getElementById('scoreLoadBtn').textContent = 'Loaded (' + targetNotes.length + ' notes)';
  setTimeout(function() {
    document.getElementById('scoreLoadBtn').classList.remove('active');
    document.getElementById('scoreLoadBtn').textContent = 'Load as Target Notes';
  }, 3000);
}

var activeDrill = null;
var drillRunning = false;

function switchRightTab(tab) {
  var tabs = document.querySelectorAll('.right-tab');
  var contents = document.querySelectorAll('.right-tab-content');
  tabs.forEach(function(t) { t.classList.remove('active'); });
  contents.forEach(function(c) { c.classList.remove('active'); });
  if (tab === 'drills') {
    tabs[0].classList.add('active');
    document.getElementById('drillsTab').classList.add('active');
  } else {
    tabs[1].classList.add('active');
    document.getElementById('scoresTab').classList.add('active');
  }
}

function selectDrill(drillId) {
  // Deselect all
  document.querySelectorAll('.drill-card').forEach(function(c) { c.classList.remove('active'); });
  var card = document.getElementById('drill-' + drillId);
  if (card) card.classList.add('active');
  activeDrill = drillId;

  // Show settings
  var settings = document.getElementById('drillSettings');
  settings.style.display = '';

  // Show/hide dynamic selector for drill 1-2
  var dynLabel = document.getElementById('drillDynamicLabel');
  dynLabel.style.display = drillId === '1-2' ? '' : 'none';

  // Update start button
  var btn = document.getElementById('drillStartBtn');
  btn.textContent = drillRunning ? 'Stop Drill' : 'Start Drill';
}

function startDrill() {
  if (drillRunning) {
    stopDrill();
    return;
  }
  if (!activeDrill) return;

  var note = parseInt(document.getElementById('drillNote').value);
  var bpm = parseInt(document.getElementById('drillBpm').value) || 80;
  var measures = parseInt(document.getElementById('drillMeasures').value) || 8;
  var timeSigParts = (document.getElementById('staffTimeSig').value || '4/4').split('/');
  var beatsPerMeasure = parseInt(timeSigParts[0]) || 4;
  var targetVelocity = activeDrill === '1-2' ? parseInt(document.getElementById('drillDynamic').value) : null;

  // Sync BPM slider
  document.getElementById('bpmSlider').value = bpm;
  document.getElementById('bpmVal').textContent = bpm;

  // Generate target notes
  targetNotes.length = 0;
  var msPerBeat = 60000 / bpm;
  var startMs = Date.now() + 2000; // 2s lead-in
  var totalBeats = measures * beatsPerMeasure;

  for (var b = 0; b < totalBeats; b++) {
    targetNotes.push({
      midi: note,
      arriveMs: startMs + b * msPerBeat,
      durationBeats: 0.5,
      velocity: targetVelocity || 64,
      hit: false
    });
  }

  drillRunning = true;
  document.getElementById('drillStartBtn').textContent = 'Stop Drill';
  document.getElementById('drillStartBtn').style.borderColor = 'var(--red, #f66)';
  document.getElementById('drillStartBtn').style.color = 'var(--red, #f66)';

  // Notify Gemini about drill start (with camera status if active)
  if (ws && ws.readyState === WebSocket.OPEN) {
    var drillName = activeDrill === '1-1' ? 'Tempo' : activeDrill === '1-2' ? 'Strength' : activeDrill;
    var camNote = cameraEnabled ? ' Camera is active — watch my hand technique.' : '';
    ws.send(JSON.stringify({ type: 'text', content: 'Starting drill: ' + drillName + '.' + camNote }));
  }
}

function stopDrill() {
  drillRunning = false;
  targetNotes.length = 0;
  document.getElementById('drillStartBtn').textContent = 'Start Drill';
  document.getElementById('drillStartBtn').style.borderColor = '';
  document.getElementById('drillStartBtn').style.color = '';
}

function toggleSheetMusicView() {

  var scorePreview = document.getElementById('scorePreview');

    scoreTree.style.display = '';
    btn.textContent = 'Sheet Music';
  }
}

// ============================================================================
// Panel resize handles (grid columns: leftCol | handle | center | handle | scoreCol)
// ============================================================================
(function() {
  var main = document.querySelector('.main');
  var leftCol = document.getElementById('leftCol');
  var scoreCol = document.getElementById('scoreCol');
  var leftHandle = document.getElementById('leftResizeHandle');
  var scoreHandle = document.getElementById('scoreResizeHandle');
  if (!main) return;

  var activeHandle = null;
  var handleSide = null; // 'left' or 'right'

  function startDrag(handle, side) {
    return function(e) {
      e.preventDefault();
      activeHandle = handle;
      handleSide = side;
      handle.classList.add('dragging');
      document.body.style.cursor = 'col-resize';
      document.body.style.userSelect = 'none';
    };
  }

  if (leftHandle) leftHandle.addEventListener('mousedown', startDrag(leftHandle, 'left'));
  if (scoreHandle) scoreHandle.addEventListener('mousedown', startDrag(scoreHandle, 'right'));

  document.addEventListener('mousemove', function(e) {
    if (!activeHandle) return;
    var mainRect = main.getBoundingClientRect();
    var leftW = leftCol ? leftCol.getBoundingClientRect().width : 260;
    var scoreW = scoreCol ? scoreCol.getBoundingClientRect().width : 560;

    if (handleSide === 'left') {
      leftW = e.clientX - mainRect.left;
      leftW = Math.max(140, Math.min(leftW, mainRect.width * 0.4));
    } else {
      scoreW = mainRect.right - e.clientX;
      scoreW = Math.max(200, Math.min(scoreW, mainRect.width * 0.5));
    }

    main.style.gridTemplateColumns = Math.round(leftW) + 'px 6px 1fr 6px ' + Math.round(scoreW) + 'px';
  });

  document.addEventListener('mouseup', function() {
    if (!activeHandle) return;
    activeHandle.classList.remove('dragging');
    activeHandle = null;
    handleSide = null;
    document.body.style.cursor = '';
    document.body.style.userSelect = '';
  });
})();
